title: Alpha Release Hardening
problem: The alpha release gate must be rebaselined after the fearless boundary reset removed llm_dart_core, promoted llm_dart_provider_utils into the publishable graph, and tightened root/provider/runtime boundaries.

evidence.summary: Fast release readiness after the boundary reset passed guards and analyzer, and printed the updated publish order without llm_dart_core.
Targeted tooling tests passed, and focused publish dry-runs for provider_utils, chat, and root passed with only expected local override hints.
Full release readiness passed after the boundary reset: guards, analyze, tests, package tests, consumer smoke, publish dry-runs for 12 packages, and pub.dev version availability.
Full release readiness passed after the provider options seam split and the provider stream naming guard test was updated to follow provider_options.dart part files.

continue_policy.notes: The branch is locally release-ready. Publish only after explicit maintainer approval, then run post-publish consumer smoke against pub.dev versions.
